item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":true,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":false,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":true,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.88,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"周一破损件漏检，打包台安排人工复看"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"周二错仓件流出，出库口设拦截岗"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"周三无码件进线，交接处插抽检班"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"今天退货批号卡住，请在分拣台放确认人"}],"abstain_reason":""}
